chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C. P. No.D — 885 of 2020. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE[S] 20.04.2022. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. None present for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ayoob Leghari Advocate for respondent No.13. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar A.A.G. Sindh. ------ In this petition the petitioner has sought a negative declaration not to transfer the leases of Irfan Coalmines, DMD/S/ML-Coal measuring 303 acres and Bilal Coalmines DMD/S/ML-Coal measuring 1652 acres located at Coal Field Lakhra District Jamshoro, till decision of the dispute which is pending before this Court and nature of the dispute is not disclosed in the prayer clauses. Be that as it may although there are serious questions regarding maintainability of this petition but since the petitioner and his counsel are called absent we dismiss it for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE A.
